app.title: Module Federation remote
app.descriptionPre: This is a standalone Svelte app. The components below are exposed over Module Federation and loaded at runtime by the React host — the exact same code, served from this app's

springToy.label: live svelte component
springToy.hint: Swing the Svelte ticket onto the far React host to mount it — it docks inside React and stays. Give it a firm tug to pull it back out (unmount).
springToy.hintStandalone: This is the remote component on its own — the same Svelte the React host mounts over Module Federation. Standalone here, it isn't mounted inside anything; just drag the ticket and let it swing.

presence.error: can't reach the cursor server — try refreshing the page
presence.cursors: {count, plural, =0 {no one else here — open a second tab} one {# other cursor live} other {# other cursors live}}
presence.standaloneNote: Live multiplayer cursors run across this whole page — move your cursor, or open a second tab. The count shows at the bottom.
